response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms or direct capital markets/fixed income domain exposure, despite claiming 5–10 years of professional development; his work is overwhelmingly in JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile systems with no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle, financial systems, or Windows-based C++ development required for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background across diverse tech stacks
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and talks
concerns: No verifiable C++ experience on Windows or in financial systems
Absence of SQL Server/Oracle or fixed income domain expertise
Employment history includes implausible claims (e.g., 'Founder, Amazon') and misaligned roles
